updates.headline: Patch 0.5.4 fixes multiplayer cars failing to load at race start
updates.summary: 505 Games lists version 0.5.4 as the latest official ACEVO patch, focused on fixing cars not loading in time in multiplayer sessions at race start.

updates.headline: Update 0.5 adds Watkins Glen, Paul Ricard, new cars, and free camera mode
updates.summary: The main 0.5 release added seven cars, Watkins Glen and Paul Ricard, free camera mode, DLSS 4.5, blue flags, and broader track-limit and dynamic-track work that the 0.5 hotfixes build on.

updates.headline: Hotfix 0.3.1 fixes shifter gear-change problems on most models
updates.summary: Supernova Games Studios published Hotfix 0.3.1 as the latest official Assetto Corsa Rally build, addressing gear-change issues on most shifters and correcting the Spanish description for the new cars.

updates.headline: Update 0.3 brings Monte Carlo stages, dynamic snow, and two more rally cars
updates.summary: The Steam store and Steam Community both show 0.3 as the latest Early Access step, adding laser-scanned Monte Carlo stages at Col de Turini and Sisteron, dynamic snow and ice conditions, two new cars, and 40 new event entries.

updates.headline: Patch #4 for Content Update #6 tightens paint-system rules and moderation tools
updates.summary: The latest official Wreckfest 2 post on Steam Community is Content Update #6 Patch #4, which adds paint-system guidelines and improves moderation and player-reporting efficiency.

updates.headline: Content Update #6 adds Hurricane, Nami, School Bus, Dalsbanen, Waypoint Race, and upgrades
updates.summary: The main Content Update #6 rollout added three vehicles, the Dalsbanen track, the new Waypoint Race mode, eight challenges, the first car-upgrade system, dirt accumulation on all surfaces, and a wide batch of stability, UI, and audio improvements.

updates.headline: Hotfix 1.01.03 fixes bosses sometimes stopping during combat
updates.summary: Pearl Abyss lists 1.01.03 as the newest official hotfix, deployed first on Steam PC, Steam Mac, PlayStation, Xbox, and Epic Games Store, with a fix for bosses freezing during combat.

updates.headline: Patch 1.01.00 adds five summonable mounts and lowers fast-travel load times
updates.summary: Pearl Abyss used 1.01.00 for the larger post-launch content drop, adding five summonable mounts, faster fast-travel and revival loading, and further control changes across supported platforms.
